name: switchboard
description: Local-first MCP profile router for multiple accounts, projects, environments, and AI coding agents.

scripts.smoke:repo-config: tmpfile=$(mktemp) && pnpm --silent --filter @switchboard-mcp/cli switchboard status --json > "$tmpfile" && node scripts/smoke/assert-repo-config.mjs "$tmpfile"
scripts.smoke:profile-test: pnpm exec tsx --conditions source apps/cli/src/index.ts test switchboard_fixture --json
